prompt: A luminous impressionistic watercolor-style illustration of a young woman standing by a lakeside in bright summer light, shown in side profile with her face turned slightly upward toward the breeze. She has dark brown hair gathered into a loose, messy low ponytail with wispy strands blowing around her head. She wears a long flowing white dress with soft translucent fabric and loose three-quarter sleeves, the skirt drifting gently in the wind. Her left hand rests on a large sunlit rock beside the trunk of a leafy tree, and her body is surrounded by exactly 2 flower colors in the foreground: vivid orange and golden yellow cosmos blossoms with thin green stems and airy leaves. The setting is a serene turquoise lake with sparkling reflections, a soft distant shoreline and hazy blue hills across the water, and an arching canopy of fresh green leaves overhead filtering warm sunlight. Compose the scene vertically, with the tree trunk on the left, the woman near center-left, the water opening to the right, and dense flowers filling the lower foreground. Use a painterly, high-key, airy style with visible brush textures, dappled sunlight, fresh greens, aqua blues, and glowing whites, evoking a peaceful early summer morning and a gentle, refreshing breeze.
